- part='left_door' nearest_part='cabinet' approx_gap=0.002m pose_index=0 pose=(freezer_drawer_slide=0, left_door_hinge=0, right_door_hinge=0) backend=fcl
- part='right_door' nearest_part='cabinet' approx_gap=0.002m pose_index=0 pose=(freezer_drawer_slide=0, left_door_hinge=0, right_door_hinge=0) backend=fcl

Adjust geometry origins or articulation placement so each isolated part is attached.
